title: Lesser & Pavey Dream Big Drinks Cup 700ml for Hot & Cold Drinks | Durable Coffee Cups for Home & Office | Comfortable & Easy-to-Hold Coffee Mugs for Beverages & Daily Use
features: Elegant Coffee Cup for Daily Enjoyment: Crafted to elevate your sipping experience, this beautifully designed cup adds comfort and charm to your coffee or tea routine, whether at home, in the office, or during peaceful mornings.

Durable and Comfortable to Hold: Made from high-quality materials, this cup ensures lasting durability and features a comfortable handle for easy gripping, making every sip feel smooth and relaxed throughout the day.

Stylish Addition to Any Cup Collection: With its timeless design, this mug complements any kitchen or tableware set, making it a stylish addition to your drinkware while adding personality to your everyday use.

Thoughtful Gift for Any Coffee or Tea Lover: A lovely gift idea for birthdays, holidays, or just because, this cup brings warmth and charm to anyone who enjoys a quiet moment with their favorite beverage.

Perfect Size for Multiple Beverages: With the approximate dimensions in LBH 10.5 Cm x 10.5 Cm x 20.5 , these cups for a variety of hot drinks including tea, coffee, and more, this versatile cup is designed to hold your favorite beverages while fitting seamlessly into your daily lifestyle.
